subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My chosen one! Today all the deeds of the divines of Persia - those heedless souls - equal not a single word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا صفیه امروز جمیع اعمال علمای ایران یعنی نفوس غافله برابری بیک کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @high station of the true believer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation
